## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on Okta's growth engine development and refine strategy for implementing AI-powered sales tools.](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rachael is developing a comprehensive "growth engine" to enhance Okta's sales processes, integrating AI, data enrichment, and contextual insights](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [The team is refining account briefs and prompts for AI tools (Gems) to improve SDR efficiency and effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [There's a focus on the retail vertical for initial implementation, with plans to expand to other industries](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Challenges with data access and security need to be addressed for seamless collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Growth Engine Development

  - [Rachael is building a "growth engine" to streamline sales processes](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Components include:](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
      - [Data enrichment (e.g., loyalty programs, login portals, tech stack)](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
      - [Contextual insights (e.g., growth initiatives, security concerns)](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
      - [AI-powered messaging](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
  - [Goal: Reduce research time and improve conversion rates (aiming for 2x improvement)](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
  - [Future plans include expanding to other verticals and integrating with marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)

### AI Tool Implementation (Gems)

  - [Currently testing with Nick (high-performing SDR) for initial feedback](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [Challenges:](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
      - [Limited processing power of Gems](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
      - [Need for clear instructions to prevent hallucinations](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [Focus on refining prompts and account briefs to improve output quality](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [Plan to roll out to more SDRs after initial testing and refinement](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)

### Retail Vertical Focus

  - [Initial focus on retail accounts with loyalty programs](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Scraping for specific data points:](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
      - [Login portals](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
      - [Loyalty program details](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
      - [Mobile app presence](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
      - [Social login availability](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Targeting accounts using legacy setups (e.g., email/password only)](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Considering partnerships (e.g., Shopify) for additional opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)

### Data Access and Security Challenges

  - [Difficulty in sharing Okta's internal data with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3102.0)
  - [Exploring options:](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3102.0)
      - [Virtual machine setup](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3102.0)
      - [CSV exports as a temporary solution](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3102.0)
  - [Need to balance data access with security concerns](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3102.0)

### Collaboration Tools

  - [Moving from Google Docs to Notion for better organization and async work](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3220.0)
  - [Planning to create a Kanban-style board for tracking ideas and progress](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3235.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rachael to provide filtered list of retail accounts to Sydney within the next hour](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3176.0)
  - [Kyle to schedule meeting with Nick (and include Rachael) to discuss AI tool usage and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3380.0)
  - [Team to explore Notion setup for better project organization and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3220.0)
  - [Continue refining account briefs and AI prompts based on initial testing](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3395.0)
  - [Investigate options for secure data sharing between Okta and GrowthX teams](https://fathom.video/share/7qvPQxEUFVyq-zv3YksSiC82ffhv9fJC?tab=summary&timestamp=3395.0)
